case_title: MILES JAMES TREASTER VS. BSH HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION, D DELAWARE CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY TREASTER, MILES JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT BSH HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION, D DELAWARE CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PROOF OF SERVICE FEES $25.00 SERVED SEP-24-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BSH HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION, D DELAWARE CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TREASTER, MILES JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BSH HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION, D DELAWARE CORP. $7,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
